# orm-public-init-empty-repo

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the initEmptyRepo mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.initEmptyRepo({ input: '<value>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run initEmptyRepo

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.initEmptyRepo({ input: '<value>' }).execute();
```
